cit.basis: Standard 20% CIT (Law on Corporate Income Tax); preferential 10% rate applies for 15 years to hi-tech enterprises and incentivized projects (15% and 17% preferential tiers also exist).
cit.note: Administered by the General Department of Taxation (GDT). Oil & gas and extractive operations are taxed at agreement-based rates of 32-50% — out of scope for this SME estimator. New: the revised CIT Law effective Oct 2025 (applying from FY2026) enacts small-enterprise rates of 15%/17% by revenue — note-only for the 2025 params year.

fct.note: Foreign Contractor Tax (FCT) applies to foreign entities doing business in or deriving income from Vietnam without a local entity; combines CIT and VAT elements at deemed rates by activity — out of scope for this SME estimator.

vat.note: Standard VAT 10%; a temporary reduction to 8% on many goods/services has been extended through 2025/2026. 5% reduced band for essential goods/services and 0% for exports.

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive personal income tax of 5-35% on employment income for tax residents.

social_insurance.note: Combined social, health and unemployment insurance contributions (approximate headline rates); caps and fund splits apply.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Incentive qualification (hi-tech certification, sector/zone tests), tax holidays, FCT, extractive-sector rates, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
